_comment: Baseline for audit-text-html-ratio.mjs. Numbers must only DECREASE — this gate is a ratchet. spa-other bumped 7→10 on 2026-04-27 to absorb the 3 locale-root SPA shells (dist/{en,de,fr}/index.html) added in a49c59a07 to fix hreflang resolution. Locale shells mirror the IT homepage (also at 2.14% ratio) and are inherently thin (SPA-hydrated content). Regenerate after lowering offenders by improving a template; never raise the numbers without explicit justification.
